description: Initial minimal production-like geo-validation dataset manifest. Imports OSMData land/water plus a verified Geofabrik Freiburg Regierungsbezirk Upper Rhine slice before expanding to larger Rhine corridor extracts.

sources.name: osmdata-land-polygons-split-4326
sources.notes: Baseline land coverage used to reject deep-land AIS positions. OSMData says this dataset contains land polygons derived from OSM natural=coastline, split into smaller WGS84 chunks for easier processing.

sources.name: osmdata-water-polygons-split-4326
sources.notes: Sea/open-water coverage used to allow ocean and coastal water before land rejection. OSMData documents this as oceans and seas from natural=coastline only; it intentionally does not cover lakes, reservoirs, rivers, or canals.

sources.name: geofabrik-upper-rhine-freiburg-regbez-waterways
sources.notes: Upper Rhine coverage on the Baden-Wuerttemberg/Freiburg side near Basel, Rheinfelden, Freiburg, and connected canals. Selected river/canal line features are buffered into polygons at import time so runtime remains polygon-only.
sources.region: Germany Baden-Wuerttemberg Freiburg Regierungsbezirk clipped to AIS coverage

sources.name: geofabrik-upper-rhine-freiburg-regbez-water-polygons
sources.notes: Mapped inland water polygons for Freiburg Regierungsbezirk upper Rhine areas, ports, docks, reservoirs, and broad water polygons where source data supports them.
sources.region: Germany Baden-Wuerttemberg Freiburg Regierungsbezirk clipped to AIS coverage
